code:
import io
import string

fn tok_at(_ xs: List<String>, _ i: Int) -> String
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)

mut best_idx = 0
mut best_count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let ti = tok_at(tokens, i)
  mut seen_before = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < i
    if tok_at(tokens, j) == ti
      seen_before = true
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not seen_before
    mut cnt = 0
    mut k = 0
    while k < tokens.len()
      if tok_at(tokens, k) == ti
        cnt = cnt + 1
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    if cnt > best_count
      best_count = cnt
      best_idx = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let best_tok = tok_at(tokens, best_idx)
println("top=#{best_tok}=#{best_count}")
